mapper.sql: ptr.id,ptr.transfer_code, ptr.pm_employee_id, ptr.from_salary, ptr.to_dept_name, ptr.to_office_name, ptr.to_dept_id, ptr.to_job_name, ptr.to_job_id, ptr.internship_salary, ptr.formal_salary, ptr.reason, ptr.self_idea, ptr.idea_date, ptr.approval_result, ptr.oa_order, ptr.approval_date, ptr.enabled_flag, ptr.approval_node, ptr.approval_employee, ptr.submit_flag, ptr.demand_code, ptr.reason_other_describes, ptr.begin_date, ptr.end_date, ptr.from_dept_name, ptr.from_office_name, ptr.from_dept_id, ptr.from_job_name, ptr.from_job_id, ptr.transfer_type, ptr.medical_type, ptr.medical_result, ptr.attribute3, ptr.attribute4, ptr.attribute1, ptr.attribute5,ptr.swm_change_flag, ptr.teacher_contract_flag,ptr.attribute2, ptr.medical_date, ptr.inface_begin_date, ptr.to_team_name, ptr.from_team_name, ptr.authentication_flag, ptr.transfer_flag,ptr.salary_change, ptr.create_time, ptr.create_by, ptr.update_time, ptr.update_by, ptr.from_salary_str, ptr.need_authentication_flag,ptr.certification_job,ptr.transfer_date, ptr.duty_lump_sum_wage,ptr.duty_base_pay,ptr.duty_post_skill_salary,ptr.duty_target_performance_pay, ptr.duty_service_department,ptr.duty_squad_leader_allowance,ptr.duty_post_subsidy,ptr.duty_seniority_allowance,ptr.duty_transportation_allowance, ptr.pra_lump_sum_wage,ptr.pra_base_pay,ptr.pra_post_skill_salary,ptr.pra_target_performance_pay, ptr.pra_service_department,ptr.pra_squad_leader_allowance,ptr.pra_post_subsidy,ptr.pra_seniority_allowance,ptr.pra_transportation_allowance,ptr.submit_form_flag,ptr.demand_job_id

${tAlias}.transfer_code as ${tAlias}_transfer_code, ${tAlias}.pm_employee_id as ${tAlias}_pm_employee_id, ${tAlias}.from_salary as ${tAlias}_from_salary, ${tAlias}.to_dept_name as ${tAlias}_to_dept_name, ${tAlias}.to_office_name as ${tAlias}_to_office_name, ${tAlias}.to_dept_id as ${tAlias}_to_dept_id, ${tAlias}.to_job_name as ${tAlias}_to_job_name, ${tAlias}.to_job_id as ${tAlias}_to_job_id, ${tAlias}.internship_salary as ${tAlias}_internship_salary, ${tAlias}.formal_salary as ${tAlias}_formal_salary, ${tAlias}.reason as ${tAlias}_reason, ${tAlias}.self_idea as ${tAlias}_self_idea, ${tAlias}.idea_date as ${tAlias}_idea_date, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.approval_node as ${tAlias}_approval_node, ${tAlias}.approval_employee as ${tAlias}_approval_employee, ${tAlias}.submit_flag as ${tAlias}_submit_flag, ${tAlias}.demand_code as ${tAlias}_demand_code, ${tAlias}.reason_other_describes as ${tAlias}_reason_other_describes, ${tAlias}.begin_date as ${tAlias}_begin_date, ${tAlias}.end_date as ${tAlias}_end_date, ${tAlias}.from_dept_name as ${tAlias}_from_dept_name, ${tAlias}.from_office_name as ${tAlias}_from_office_name, ${tAlias}.from_dept_id as ${tAlias}_from_dept_id, ${tAlias}.from_job_name as ${tAlias}_from_job_name, ${tAlias}.from_job_id as ${tAlias}_from_job_id, ${tAlias}.transfer_type as ${tAlias}_transfer_type, ${tAlias}.medical_type as ${tAlias}_medical_type, ${tAlias}.medical_result as ${tAlias}_medical_result, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.swm_change_flag as ${tAlias}_swm_change_flag, ${tAlias}.teacher_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_teacher_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.medical_date as ${tAlias}_medical_date, ${tAlias}.inface_begin_date as ${tAlias}_inface_begin_date, ${tAlias}.to_team_name as ${tAlias}_to_team_name, ${tAlias}.from_team_name as ${tAlias}_from_team_name, ${tAlias}.authentication_flag as ${tAlias}_authentication_flag, ${tAlias}.salary_change as ${tAlias}_salary_change, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.from_salary_str as ${tAlias}_from_salary_str, ${tAlias}.submit_form_flag as ${tAlias}_submit_form_flag, ${tAlias}.demand_job_id as ${tAlias}_demand_job_id

select
,
,
,
,
,
,
from pm_transfer_request ptr join pm_employee pe on ptr.pm_employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left join swm_employee se on se.employee_id=pe.id and se.work_flag= 1 left join pm_transfer_comment ptc on ptr.id = ptc.transfer_id left join pm_employee_education pe_pee on pe.id = pe_pee.employee_id and pe_pee.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_pee.new_education_flag = 1 left join pm_employee_entry pe_peen on pe.id = pe_peen.employee_id and pe_peen.enabled_flag = 1 outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) pett_ap.* FROM pm_employee_tele pett_ap WHERE pett_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pett_ap.enabled_flag = 1 order by id desc ) pe_pett
mapper.insert: insert into pm_transfer_request (transfer_code, pm_employee_id, from_salary, to_dept_name, to_office_name, to_dept_id, to_job_name, to_job_id, internship_salary, formal_salary, reason, self_idea, idea_date, approval_result, oa_order, approval_date, enabled_flag, approval_node, approval_employee, submit_flag, demand_code, reason_other_describes, begin_date, end_date, from_dept_name, from_office_name, from_dept_id, from_job_name, from_job_id, transfer_type, medical_type, medical_result, attribute3, attribute4, attribute1, attribute5, attribute2, swm_change_flag,teacher_contract_flag, medical_date, inface_begin_date, to_team_name, from_team_name, authentication_flag,transfer_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, from_salary_str, need_authentication_flag,certification_job,transfer_date,submit_form_flag,demand_job_id) values (#{transferCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fromSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{toDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toOfficeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{toJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{internshipSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{formalSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selfIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ideaDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{demandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reasonOtherDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{fromDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromOfficeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fromJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transferType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{medicalType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{medicalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{swmChangeFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacherContractFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{medicalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{infaceBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{toTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authenticationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{transferFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fromSalaryStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{needAuthenticationFlag,jdbcType=BIT},#{certificationJob,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{transferDate,jdbcType=DATE},0,#{demandJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_transfer_request set transfer_code = #{transferCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pm_employee_id = #{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, from_salary = #{fromSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, to_dept_name = #{toDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_office_name = #{toOfficeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_dept_id = #{toDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, to_job_name = #{toJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_job_id = #{toJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, internship_salary = #{internshipSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, formal_salary = #{formalSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, self_idea = #{selfIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, idea_date = #{ideaDate,jdbcType=DATE}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_date = #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, submit_flag = #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, demand_code = #{demandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reason_other_describes = #{reasonOtherDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, begin_date = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, from_dept_name = #{fromDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_office_name = #{fromOfficeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_dept_id = #{fromDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, from_job_name = #{fromJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_job_id = #{fromJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, transfer_type = #{transferType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, medical_type = #{medicalType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, medical_result = #{medicalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, swm_change_flag = #{swmChangeFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_contract_flag = #{teacherContractFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, medical_date = #{medicalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, inface_begin_date = #{infaceBeginDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, to_team_name = #{toTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_team_name = #{fromTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authentication_flag = #{authenticationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, transfer_flag = #{transferFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, salary_change = #{salaryChange,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, from_salary_str = #{fromSalaryStr, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, need_authentication_flag = #{needAuthenticationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, certification_job = #{certificationJob,jdbcType=VARCHAR},transfer_date = #{transferDate,jdbcType=DATE}, demand_job_id = #{demandJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update pm_transfer_request set approval_date = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
medical_result = #{medicalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, medical_date = #{updateTime,jdbcType=DATE},
transfer_date = #{transferDate,jdbcType=DATE},
inface_begin_date = #{infaceBeginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update pm_transfer_request set
medical_type = #{medicalType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salary_change = #{salaryChange,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
internship_salary = #{internshipSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
formal_salary = #{formalSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
medical_result = #{medicalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, medical_date = #{updateTime,jdbcType=DATE},
pra_lump_sum_wage = #{praLumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pra_base_pay = #{praBasePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pra_post_skill_salary = #{praPostSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pra_target_performance_pay = #{praTargetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pra_service_department = #{praServiceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pra_squad_leader_allowance = #{praSquadLeaderAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pra_post_subsidy = #{praPostSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pra_seniority_allowance = #{praSeniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pra_transportation_allowance = #{praTransportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_lump_sum_wage = #{dutyLumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_base_pay = #{dutyBasePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_post_skill_salary = #{dutyPostSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_target_performance_pay = #{dutyTargetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_service_department = #{dutyServiceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duty_squad_leader_allowance = #{dutySquadLeaderAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_post_subsidy = #{dutyPostSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_seniority_allowance = #{dutySeniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
duty_transportation_allowance = #{dutyTransportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: where ptr.pm_employee_id = #{pmEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ptr.end_date > CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) and ptr.submit_flag=1 and approval_result !='notPass'
